charter.phase_name: V1.12BH CPO Neutral Selective No-Leak Portfolio Pilot
charter.mission: Run a no-leak selective portfolio line on the same lawful 10-row CPO layer with explicit cash admission, stricter probability gates, and drawdown-aware participation discipline.
in_scope: equity, drawdown, and trade trace output
success_criteria: the pilot can remain in cash when the gate stack is not met
the pilot reports its comparison to both oracle and aggressive tracks

interpretation: V1.12BH is not a smaller aggressive track; it is a different objective line that explicitly values cash, drawdown control, and profit-factor quality.
The neutral track remains experimental and non-deployable.
